creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Gentlemen!

Thu, Dec 11, 2008 at 02:10:01PM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129572
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       [patch] security/gnutls: remove functional regression caused by fix for CVE-2008-4989
> >Arrival-Date:   Thu Dec 11 14:10:01 UTC 2008

May I remind you about this PR -- the regression is better to be fixed:
Verisign is the popular X.509 vendor and their old certificates are
still used.  GnuTLS won't be able to verify them without this patch.

Thanks!
-- 
Eygene

 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook
